testcase.name: @AfterClass tc02
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.NoSuchElementException: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"xpath","selector":"//*[text()='Add New']"} (Session info: chrome=137.0.7151.104) For testcase.name: @AfterClass tc02
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.remote.UnreachableBrowserException: Error communicating with the remote browser. It may have died.
